title: melinis subglabra
intro: Melinis subglabra, also known as the creeping melinis or creeping grass, is a type of tropical grass native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Melinis subglabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
